name: TestKnowledgeBase
replacement_policy: Specification_Repository will not play a practical role in subsequent iterations. New fault patterns, professional acceptance criteria, overlays, and promotions must land in TestKnowledgeBase.

fault.purpose: fault-driven test knowledge for REST/API, Web, Agent, and DFX scenarios

professional_experience.purpose: advisory release gates, AI evaluation readiness, professional testing acceptance criteria, and runtime professional acceptance artifacts

contract_policy: Knowledge can decide what to test and what to report, but strong executable assertions must still cite contract.md.
